heading: Today
text: A stray morning snow shower from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, then variable clouds and sun. Morning sun south, mixing with clouds. Highs in the 30s to low 40s north, 40s to near 50 south. Northwest winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming light, turning to the south.

heading: Tonight
text: Cloudy. A chance of rain or snow showers from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, changing to mainly snow showers. Lows in the 20s to near 30 north, in the low to mid 30s south. Winds south 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph through the Champlain Valley and across the higher terrain.

heading: Thursday
text: A chance of snow showers north, changing to rain showers and diminishing. A chance of morning rain showers south. Much milder. Highs in the 40s north, 50s south. South to southwest winds 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph, diminishing to less than 10 mph in the afternoon.
